name: agilecrm
description: Reads AgileCRM contacts, deals, tasks, milestone pipelines, campaigns, and support tickets, and writes contact/deal/task create, update, and delete actions, through the AgileCRM REST API.

risk.read: external AgileCRM API read of contacts, deals, tasks, pipeline, campaign, and ticket data
risk.write: external mutation of live AgileCRM contacts, deals, and tasks including irreversible deletes; approval required for every write action
